title: 'Ari'el #0740
definition:
Ariel = "lion of God" or "lioness of God"

 1) a name applied to Jerusalem
 2) the name of a chief of the returning exiles
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ariel = "lion of God" or "lioness of God"

 1) a name applied to Jerusalem
 2) the name of a chief of the returning exiles

    NASB:  lioness of El, a symbolic name for Jer.
